content.en:
"No wonder I was besieged before, it turns out that the reincarnation golden worm can easily ask for help, and the support will arrive as soon as possible, even if it is a powerful Origin Upper Realm overlord, it is easy to be besieged!" Ye Tian said darkly.

With this reincarnation golden worm replicating body, he can move smoothly in the ruins of reincarnation.

At this time, many reincarnation gold worms are asking for help, obviously in danger.

"Could it be that other Origin Upper Realm Overlords have come to the ruins of reincarnation and fought with these reincarnation golden insects?"

Ye Tian guessed.

Then.

He followed a group of reincarnation gold worms to one of the coordinate locations and went there to see what was going on.

......

Wow!!!!

One by one, the reincarnation golden worms shuttled out of the distorted picture and came to a void somewhere in the ruins of reincarnation.

Here, a majestic figure is fighting against a group of reincarnation gold bugs.

Ordinary reincarnation golden insects are not qualified to participate in it at all, because the strength of that Origin Upper Realm Overlord is too terrifying!!!

Rumble!!!

Some weak reincarnation golden insects were directly exploded, but weakness was also relatively speaking, for Ye Tian, those weak reincarnation golden insects were at least comparable to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who had awakened five or even six times.

"That's ......"

Ye Tian didn't know each other, he had never seen it, it should be an ancient Origin Upper Realm Overlord in the Land of Eternity, he had been sleeping before, so he hadn't seen it.

But.

He relied on copying his talent, but he still found out the talent and name of the other party.

"Wild Ancestor!"

Seeing this title, he roughly knew the identity of the other party.

The founder of the Ancient Heavenly Palace, the legendary Desolate Ancestor, is extremely terrifying, and the specific strength, he naturally does not know, but from the current point of view, this Desolate Ancestor is afraid that he has reached the level of eight awakenings.

However, on the side of the reincarnation golden worm, there is also a reincarnation golden worm that is comparable to the desolate ancestor, which causes the desolate ancestor to be unable to kill all the reincarnation golden insects here.

But if the reincarnation gold worm with weak strength gets close, it is dead.

Ye Tian naturally didn't come close, just watched here.

Abrupt.

The body of a reincarnation golden insect whose strength had reached the level of the Seven Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord Combat Power was shattered and thrown to Ye Tian's side.

The other reincarnation gold insects naturally had no interest in this reincarnation gold insect corpse, but Ye Tian was interested!

"The origin stone of the reincarnation golden worm is still there!"

He immediately found this piece of origin stone and put it away.

This kind of origin stone may not mean much to the desolate ancestor, at most it will be given to the juniors, but it will be too useful for him!

Thereupon.

His reincarnation golden worm copy body immediately withdrew, and this piece of origin stone was taken away and sent to the hands of another copy body.

However, when he came here next time, he found that the Wild Ancestor had fled.

Subsequently.

He went to look elsewhere and found that there were really a lot of Origin Upper Realm Overlords who had entered the ruins of reincarnation, but they were all Origin Upper Realm Overlords who had never been seen before, and they were all ancient beings who were asleep.

Of course, Ye Tian also secretly collected some reincarnation gold worm origin stones by watching the play, even if it was sometimes affected, causing the reincarnation golden worm to copy the body to fall, he could also copy another reincarnation gold worm copy body in a short time.

Gradually, he also collected a lot of reincarnation gold worm origin stones.

But at this time, he found a problem.

If you don't refine the Reincarnation Gold Worm Origin Stone for a certain period of time, the Origin will be sucked away by a force.

He tried to bring the Reincarnation Golden Worm Origin Stone into the land of eternity, but as soon as he returned to the land of eternity, the origin of the Reincarnation Golden Worm Origin Stone was directly withdrawn.

In other words, the Reincarnation Golden Worm Origin Stone could not be brought into the land of eternity at all, and it had to be absorbed and refined as soon as possible, otherwise it would be wasted.

"No wonder the Origin Upper Realm Overlords of these forces in the Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace are not very powerful, if they can bring the Reincarnation Golden Worm Origin Stone into the land of eternity, then these ancient beings of the Desolate Ancestor can definitely collect a large number of Reincarnation Golden Worm Origin Stones, even if they are useless to themselves, they can also cultivate the Origin Upper Realm Overlords under their command!"

When Ye Tian thought about it like this, he figured it out.

"In the ruins of reincarnation, you will be chased and killed by the reincarnation golden worm all the time, even if you kill some reincarnation golden worms, the reincarnation golden worm origin stone obtained must be refined as soon as possible, otherwise it will be wasted! After the breakthrough returns, those reincarnation gold worm origin stones will be useless. "

Thinking about it this way, it seems that there is no point in him collecting a lot of reincarnation gold worm origin stones!

But.

He still tried his best to absorb the origin of the reincarnation golden worm origin stone, and used it to improve his reincarnation Haotian body and reincarnation Haotian origin, and his cultivation was rapidly improving.

Gradually, his cultivation was already approaching the limit of the second balance, and if he raised the will of the Origin Realm, he would be able to impact the third balance.

"Strange, even if the Desolate Ancestors obtained the Reincarnation Golden Worm Origin Stone, at most they would raise their cultivation to the current limit, and they would not be able to help them break through, they had already reached the bottleneck, the Reincarnation Golden Worm Origin Stone was useless to them, what were they doing when they entered the ruins of reincarnation at this time?"

Ye Tian was very curious about this.

So, he tried to investigate the situation as much as he could.

After exploring again and again, he found that the Desolate Ancestors seemed to be looking for something, and they didn't care about those reincarnation golden worm origin stones.

But they haven't found it yet, because Ye Tian doesn't know what they're looking for.

......

Somewhere in the ruins of reincarnation.

The Desolate Ancestor got rid of a batch of reincarnation golden insects, shuttled quickly, and happened to meet another Origin Upper Realm Overlord - Zhen Ancestor!

Zhenzu is the ancestor behind Zhentian Realm City, and his strength is no less than that of Desolate Ancestor.

"Zhenzu, did you find it?"

Arazu asked.

"Didn't find it!" Zhenzu shook his head, "Anyway, there are more than a million primeval era time, we can find it slowly." Wasteland, do you have any clues?"

"I don't have any clues, we entered here, and we were targeted by the reincarnation gold worm again and again, they are elusive, and we can't shuttle like them. It's a pity that before it ends, these reincarnation gold worms have been carrying them outside, and they don't return to the reincarnation gold worm nest at all, otherwise they can track the reincarnation gold worm to find their nest!"

Zhenzu nodded: "Yes, when the time is over and they all return to the lair, it will be too late at that time." Find it slowly, last time, didn't you find it, but you and I didn't gain much. "

Whew!!

They ended chatting and soon separated.
